---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the situation where you find the plugin lacking.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Is This In the Roadmap?

Have you checked the [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md)? If yes, does this expand on something planned, or is it a new direction?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or other context that would help.
